## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test` pass locally
- [ ] New/changed engine behavior has tests
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or config changed
- [ ] An ADR added under `docs/adr/` if this is a significant technical decision
- [ ] Works without an LLM (deterministic-first) and stays local-first
